title: senecio auricula subsp. sicoricus
intro: Senecio auricula subsp. sicoricus, also known as Golden Ragwort, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Senecio auricula subsp. sicoricus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Golden Ragwort is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
